metadata.title: RamcarSoft — Residential Access Control & Security
metadata.description: Security platform for gated communities. Access control, guard shifts, and amenity bookings.

hero.headline: Access control and security for residential communities, from any device.
hero.subheadline: Manage visitor entry, guard shifts, and amenity bookings — all in one platform built for Mexican fraccionamientos.

1.title: No visitor records
1.body: Visitor arrivals with no prior record or ID check. Anyone can walk in.

2.title: WhatsApp gate management
2.body: Gate access managed through WhatsApp group chats. No audit trail, no accountability.

3.title: No incident history
3.body: No historical log when an incident occurs. When something happens, there's no record to review.

4.title: Handwritten logs
4.body: Guards writing entry records by hand in a notebook. Illegible, easily lost, impossible to search.

5.title: Zero visibility for residents
5.body: Residents have no visibility into who enters their community. They only find out after the fact — if at all.

1.title: Resident pre-registers a visit
1.body: From the app, before the guest arrives.

2.title: Guard confirms at the gate
2.body: Scans the pre-registration or registers the visitor on-site.

3.title: Access is logged automatically
3.body: Full record: name, time, vehicle, photos.

4.title: Resident gets notified
4.body: Push notification the moment their guest enters.

items.1: Manage all residents and their access permissions
items.2: View full access history with filters and exports
items.3: Configure guard shifts and patrol routes
items.5: Receive alerts for blacklisted visitors or vehicles

items.1: Register and verify visitors on-site (with or without internet)
items.2: Check visitor pre-registrations in real time
items.3: Log incidents with photos and notes
items.5: View the community blacklist before granting access

items.1: Pre-register guests and send them a QR entry pass
items.2: Authorize recurring visitors (housekeeper, dog walker, delivery)
items.3: Book amenities: pool, gym, event hall
items.4: Receive real-time push notifications on every access event

1.title: Works without internet
1.body: The guard booth app keeps working during outages. No connectivity, no problem.

2.title: Mobile-friendly for residents
2.body: iOS and Android app. Nothing to install on the guard PC beyond our desktop app.

3.title: Complete audit trail
3.body: Every entry, every exit, every incident — searchable and exportable.

4.title: Visitor blacklist
4.body: Flag vehicles or individuals community-wide. Guards are alerted automatically.

5.title: Amenity management included
5.body: No separate tool needed for pool or gym reservations.

6.title: Designed for Mexico
6.body: Built with Mexican regulations, INE verification, and local community workflows in mind.

socialProof.headline: Built for Mexican residential communities
socialProof.body: RamcarSoft was designed from the ground up for how fraccionamientos actually operate — not adapted from US or European tools. From INE verification to offline guard booths, every feature reflects a real Mexican community workflow.

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.note: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.customPlan: Need a custom plan for large communities? Contact us →

1.question: Does it require special hardware at the gate?
1.answer: No. The guard uses our desktop app on any Windows PC. No cameras or special equipment required for v1.

2.question: What happens if the internet goes down at the gatehouse?
2.answer: The desktop app works fully offline. Access logs are stored locally and synced automatically when connectivity is restored.

3.question: Is there an annual contract?
3.answer: No. All plans are month-to-month. You can cancel anytime.

4.question: How many users are included?
4.answer: Each plan specifies the number of resident accounts and guard accounts. Admins are unlimited on all plans.

5.question: Is our residents' personal data secure?
5.answer: Yes. Data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We comply with Mexico's LFPDPPP (Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales).

6.question: Can I manage multiple communities from one account?
6.answer: Yes, the Premium plan supports up to 3 communities. For more, contact us for a custom plan.

7.question: How long does onboarding take?
7.answer: Most communities are up and running within one business day. We provide guided setup support.

cta.headline: Ready to modernize your community's security?
